title: Document optimization workflow and KPI interpretation in the public web app
description:
## Summary
Document the optimization workflow and KPI interpretation in the public-facing web app documentation.

## Deliverables
- Document the staged deterministic/random workflow.
- Document how to interpret generalization gap, stability, malfunction mix, and workflow routing decisions.
- Document how this workflow relates to deterministic datasets, RCA, and misclassification classification.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting docs slice: add explicit operator guidance for interpreting candidate assessment KPIs and workflow routing decisions (generalization gap/stability, malfunction mix/primary_next_action), and connect this to associated-dataset deterministic checks plus RCA misclassification analysis.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Completed docs update in evaluate-score documentation: added operator section for workflow KPI/decision interpretation covering stage evidence (deterministic/random n=50/random gate n=200), generalization-gap metric meanings (gap delta, random mean/stddev), malfunction-routing actions, and how to combine associated-dataset reproducibility with misclassification/RCA triage.
